Cook-App
  • Search blueprint
  • View page source

Search blueprint

GET /search-recipe?q=<query>

Description

Search recipes by title or other indexed fields. Query is passed as the q parameter on the querystring.

Success Response

{ "recipes": [ { "recipe_id": 1, "recipe_title": "Pancakes", "ingredients": [ ... ] }, ... ] }

Errors

  • 400 if q is empty.

Client mapping

  • frontend/features/search_recipe/services/search_recipe_service.dart calls this endpoint and renders results in SearchPage.
